rationale_source: F2.PD × F2.DH symmetric coverage (R10-F): complete docs do NOT override discrepancyHold suppression of prelim dispatch

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Broker correction $460k; loan_app $180k (>30% discrepancy). F1.LA broker_correction wins; loan_app SUPPRESSED per R11-B-1 Layer 1.

discrepancyHold.rationale: Major discrepancy activates F2.DH per R11-B-1 + R10-F.

workflow_state.rationale: Held for admin review; no state transition.

outbound_emails.rationale: F2.PD SUPPRESSED by F2.DH ACTIVE per R10-F symmetric coverage. Complete docs do NOT override the hold.

must_not_include.rationale: Suppressed loan_app value (R11-B-1 Layer 1) must NOT appear as canonical figure.
